title: Emoji and Reactions
drDigitalIntro: Emoji are small pictures you can use to express feelings. Instead of typing 'haha', you can send a laughing emoji 😂. Messages has thousands of emoji to choose from. You can also react to someone else's message — hover over a message and click the smiley face icon to add a reaction (thumbs up, love, laughing, etc.). Reactions are a quick way to respond without typing a full message.

playgroundTask.question: How do you react to someone's message with a thumbs up in Messages?

options.text: Type the word 'thumbs up' and send it
Hover over the message and click the smiley face icon
Hold down Command while clicking the message

drDigitalSuccess: Hover over the message to reveal the tapback reactions — a quick way to respond without typing anything.
drDigitalHint: Move your cursor over a message in the conversation and watch what appears near it.
